mapper.select: select * from fp_infrastructure_resource where order by resource_type asc, resource_name asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}
select * from fp_infrastructure_resource where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select count(1) from fp_infrastructure_resource where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and infrastructure_id = #{infrastructureId}
mapper.delete: delete from fp_infrastructure_resource where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and infrastructure_id = #{infrastructureId}
mapper.insert: merge into fp_infrastructure_resource (id, tenant_id, infrastructure_id, resource_type, resource_name, resource_code, status, metadata_json, last_sync_at, created_at, updated_at) key(tenant_id, infrastructure_id, resource_type, resource_code) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{infrastructureId}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceName}, #{resourceCode}, #{status}, #{metadataJson}, #{lastSyncAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
